title: leucanthemopsis virescens
intro: Leucanthemopsis virescens, also known as the green alpine daisy or alpine daisy, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Leucanthemopsis virescens include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic. Leucanthemopsis virescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
